creator: eugen@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 186414
fix build of sys/modules/i2c

sys/modules/i2c cannot be built anymore without kernel build environment:

===> ds1307 (all)
cc -O2 -pipe -march=core2  -fno-strict-aliasing -Werror -D_KERNEL -DKLD_MODULE -nostdinc   -I. -I/home/src/sys -fno-common  -fno-omit-frame-pointer -mno-omit-leaf-frame-pointer  -MD  -MF.depend.ds1307.o -MTds1307.o -mcmodel=kernel -mno-red-zone -mno-mmx -mno-sse -msoft-float  -fno-asynchronous-unwind-tables -ffreestanding -fwrapv -fstack-protector -Wall -Wredundant-decls -Wnested-externs -Wstrict-prototypes -Wmissing-prototypes -Wpointer-arith -Winline -Wcast-qual -Wundef -Wno-pointer-sign -D__printf__=__freebsd_kprintf__ -Wmissing-include-dirs -fdiagnostics-show-option -Wno-unknown-pragmas -Wno-error-tautological-compare -Wno-error-empty-body -Wno-error-parentheses-equality -Wno-error-unused-function -Wno-error-pointer-sign -Wno-error-shift-negative-value -Wno-error-address-of-packed-member  -mno-aes -mno-avx  -std=iso9899:1999 -c /home/src/sys/dev/iicbus/ds1307.c -o ds1307.o
/home/src/sys/dev/iicbus/ds1307.c:34:10: fatal error: 'opt_platform.h' file not found
#include "opt_platform.h"
         ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
1 error generated.
*** Error code 1


Attached patch fixes this.
